title: IIT Kanpur – Technical Assistant – 1 Posts

basic_details.job_title: IIT Kanpur Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur) invites applications for 1 post of Technical Assistant from Graduate candidates with ITI qualification or relevant experience, and the email application process will run until 28 May 2026 at iitk.ac.in.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Kanpur Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
